zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Davenport於大約1442年出生在英國爾達文波特時，他的父親John Davenport45歲，母親Joan Mainwaring41歲。他於1461年與Margery Davenport在英國爾達文波特 在 斯托普特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1510年5月25日在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國爾普雷斯特波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Davenport于大约1442年出生在英国爾達文波特时，他的父亲John Davenport45岁，母亲Joan Mainwaring41岁。他于1461年与Margery Davenport在英国爾達文波特 在 斯托普特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1510年5月25日在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国爾普雷斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Davenport was born about 1442, in Davenport, Cheshire, England, his father, John Davenport, was 45 and his mother, Joan Mainwaring, was 41. He married Margery Davenport in 1461, in Davenport in Stockport, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 25 May 1510, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Davenport est né environ 1442, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Davenport, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Joan Mainwaring, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Margery Davenport en 1461, à Davenport in Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 25 mai 1510, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Davenport um 1442 in Davenport, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Davenport 45 und seine Mutter Joan Mainwaring 41. Er hat 1461 in Davenport in Stockport, Cheshire, England Margery Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Mai 1510 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Prestbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Davenport è nato il circa 1442 nel Davenport, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, John Davenport, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Joan Mainwaring, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Margery Davenport nel 1461, nel Davenport in Stockport, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 maggio 1510, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Davenportが約1442年にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトで生まれた時，父John Davenportは45歳，母Joan Mainwaringは41歳であった。1461年にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルト イン ストクプオルトでMargery Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1510年5月25日に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Davenport(이)가 대략 1442년 영국 체실르 대븐포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Davenport(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Mainwaring(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1461년 영국 체실르 대븐포트 인 스톡포트에서 Margery Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1510년 5월 25일 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 플레스트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.living 1489: de 10 de janeiro de 1489 a 9 de janeiro de 1490
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Davenport nasceu aproximadamente 1442, em Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Davenport, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Joan Mainwaring, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Davenport em 1461, em Davenport in Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de maio de 1510, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Davenport родился около 1442 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Davenport было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Mainwaring, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Davenport в 1461 г. в местности давенпорт ин стоккпорт, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 25 мая 1510 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности престбури, чешир, Англия.

Se casó con Margery Davenport en 1461, en Davenport in Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1510, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
